verses.text: Moses gathers the people; the sabbath rest is reaffirmed, no fire kindled. Sabbath. Even holy work pauses for rest.
Moses gathers the people; the sabbath rest is reaffirmed, no fire kindled. Sabbath. Even holy work pauses for rest.
Moses gathers the people; the sabbath rest is reaffirmed, no fire kindled. Sabbath. Even holy work pauses for rest.
He calls for a willing offering of gold, silver, and blue for the tabernacle. Willing gift. God's house is built by glad hearts.
He calls for a willing offering of gold, silver, and blue for the tabernacle. Willing gift. God's house is built by glad hearts.
He calls for a willing offering of gold, silver, and blue for the tabernacle. Willing gift. God's house is built by glad hearts.
Rams' skins, wood, oil, spices, and onyx stones are to be brought. Materials. Each gives what he has.
Rams' skins, wood, oil, spices, and onyx stones are to be brought. Materials. Each gives what he has.
Rams' skins, wood, oil, spices, and onyx stones are to be brought. Materials. Each gives what he has.
Wise-hearted men are to make the tabernacle, the ark, the table, and their vessels. The workers. Skill is offered to God.
Wise-hearted men are to make the tabernacle, the ark, the table, and their vessels. The workers. Skill is offered to God.

The candlestick, the altar of incense, and the altar of burnt offering. The furnishings. Each holy vessel is to be made.
The candlestick, the altar of incense, and the altar of burnt offering. The furnishings. Each holy vessel is to be made.
The candlestick, the altar of incense, and the altar of burnt offering. The furnishings. Each holy vessel is to be made.
The hangings of the court and the holy garments. The hangings. The whole sanctuary is provided for.
The hangings of the court and the holy garments. The hangings. The whole sanctuary is provided for.
The hangings of the court and the holy garments. The hangings. The whole sanctuary is provided for.
The people bring bracelets, gold, blue, and linen willingly. Generous. They give abundantly to God.
The people bring bracelets, gold, blue, and linen willingly. Generous. They give abundantly to God.

The people bring bracelets, gold, blue, and linen willingly. Generous. They give abundantly to God.
The women spin with their hands, in wisdom of heart. Skilled hands. All gifts and skills are welcome.
The women spin with their hands, in wisdom of heart. Skilled hands. All gifts and skills are welcome.
The rulers bring stones and spices; all give willingly. A willing people. The whole congregation shares.
The rulers bring stones and spices; all give willingly. A willing people. The whole congregation shares.
The rulers bring stones and spices; all give willingly. A willing people. The whole congregation shares.
Bezaleel is named, filled with the Spirit of God in wisdom and all workmanship. Spirit-filled. God gives skill for His service.
Bezaleel is named, filled with the Spirit of God in wisdom and all workmanship. Spirit-filled. God gives skill for His service.
Bezaleel is named, filled with the Spirit of God in wisdom and all workmanship. Spirit-filled. God gives skill for His service.
God put in his and Aholiab's hearts the gift to teach and work all crafts. To teach. He equips them to instruct others.
